features.name: base_plate
features.description: 2mm solid flat base replacing the Gridfinity base grid. Provides a stable print bed surface and closes the bottom of the cavity.

features.name: cavity_walls
features.description: Rectangular shell forming the 72x20mm display body cavity. Walls are 5.75mm thick on X sides and 2.5mm thick on Y sides. Outer corners have 3.75mm radius, cavity corners have 2.0mm radius. Open at the top for caliper insertion.

printOrientation.z_direction: cavity opens upward — caliper inserts from above
